rules.detail: Package status is DEPRECATED; CERTIFIED or RETRIEVAL_READY is required.
All required package metadata fields are present.
No knowledge object with a source_reference is registered for this package.

corrective_actions: Promote the package through VERIFIED -> CERTIFIED before requesting retrieval readiness.
This package has been withdrawn; register a new package version instead of retrieving this one.
Register a Knowledge Object with a source_reference for this package via the Knowledge Object & Provenance Engine.
